moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games begin today in Glasgow, bringing together 3,000 athletes from 74 nations for 11 days of competition and an opening ceremony featuring KT Tunstall and Tom Walker.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow 2026! The Commonwealth Games are officially underway with tonight's star-studded opening ceremony at The Hydro. Who are you buzzing to see perform?

angles.name: Team UK Support
angles.copy: Let the Games begin! The Commonwealth Games kick off today in Glasgow. Get ready to cheer on our athletes for 11 days of incredible sport!

moments.title: The Open Championship concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, held at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, concluded on July 19th with Ryan Fox taking home the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Major Winner
angles.copy: What a tournament! The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale delivered, with Ryan Fox crowned champion. Who had him in their picks?

moments.title: Latitude Festival is live
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival is happening now at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Live from Latitude
angles.copy: The party is ON at Latitude Festival! Who's soaking up the vibes and catching David Byrne, Teddy Swims or Lewis Capaldi this weekend in Suffolk?

angles.name: Suffolk Festival
angles.copy: Henham Park is buzzing! Latitude Festival is happening right now, bringing huge names and incredible energy to Suffolk. Are you there?

moments.title: Truck Festival underway
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, a diverse music event, is currently taking place at Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire, from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, tunes are loud! Truck Festival is bringing the noise to Oxfordshire this weekend. Who's loving the lineup?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival next week
moments.blurb: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next week, running from July 30th to August 1st at Belladrum Estate near Inverness, Scotland, with headliners James, The Human League and Callum Beattie.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Prep
angles.copy: Get ready, Highlands! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival is just days away. James, The Human League, Callum Beattie – who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: One week to go until Belladrum! Scotland's Tartan Heart Festival is almost here with an amazing lineup. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival approaches
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30th to August 2nd, featuring headliners like The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club and The Streets.

angles.name: Derbyshire Festival
angles.copy: Next week, Y-Not Festival takes over Derbyshire! Ready for The Libertines, The Streets and more? It's going to be huge!

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset next week
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset is set to bring music and family fun to Lulworth Castle from July 30th to August 2nd, with acts including Bastille, Fatboy Slim and Billy Ocean.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Who's heading to Camp Bestival Dorset next week? Bastille, Fatboy Slim, Billy Ocean – sounds like an amazing family weekend at Lulworth Castle!

moments.title: Wilderness Festival approaching
moments.blurb: Wilderness Festival, a unique music and arts event, is scheduled for July 30th to August 2nd at Cornbury Park in Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Unique Festival Experience
angles.copy: Get ready for a different kind of festival! Wilderness Festival is almost here, bringing music, arts, and wellbeing to Oxfordshire from July 30th.

moments.title: Grace Jones plays London's Crystal Palace Bowl
moments.blurb: Iconic artist Grace Jones will headline 'Palace Bowl Presents' at Crystal Palace Bowl in London on July 31st, with special guests Sophie Ellis-Bextor and Soul II Soul.

angles.name: London Icon
angles.copy: Grace Jones, Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Soul II Soul – what a line-up! Crystal Palace Bowl is going to be electric on July 31st. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Legendary Lineup
angles.copy: Grace Jones is heading to London next week! With Sophie Ellis-Bextor and Soul II Soul, it's a night of pure legends at Crystal Palace Bowl.

moments.title: Liam Gallagher denies Oasis 2026 reunion
moments.blurb: Despite ongoing fan speculation and rumours of Knebworth gigs, Liam Gallagher has definitively stated that Oasis has no plans to tour in 2026.

angles.name: Noel & Liam Update
angles.copy: Bad news, Oasis fans: Liam Gallagher has shut down all rumours of a 2026 reunion, saying 'IT'S NOT HAPPENING'. Looks like we'll have to wait a bit longer for that Wonderwall moment. #Oasis

angles.name: Knebworth Rumours
angles.copy: The Knebworth rumours can stop. Liam Gallagher confirms Oasis won't be playing in 2026. Gutted or were you expecting it?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open golf championship will take place at Royal Lytham and St Annes, England, from July 29th to August 2nd.

angles.name: Women's Golf Major
angles.copy: The world's best women golfers are heading to Royal Lytham & St Annes next week for the AIG Women's Open! Who are your favourites to watch?

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Visionary singer-songwriter Kate Bush, known for hits like 'Wuthering Heights', turns 68 on July 30th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Icon
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to the incredible Kate Bush! The iconic artist turns 68 on July 30th. What's your favourite Kate Bush track?

moments.title: Paul Anka's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Paul Anka, famous for 'Diana' and 'My Way', celebrates his 85th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Crooner's Birthday
angles.copy: A very happy 85th birthday to the one and only Paul Anka on July 30th! Still singing 'My Way' after all these years. What's your favourite Paul Anka classic?

moments.title: Buddy Guy's 90th Birthday
moments.blurb: Blues guitar legend Buddy Guy, a major influence on rock and blues musicians, turns 90 on July 30th.

angles.name: Blues Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a monumental 90th birthday to the incredible bluesman Buddy Guy on July 30th! A true guitar hero. What's your favourite Buddy Guy track?

moments.title: Fatboy Slim's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Influential DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, known for hits like 'Praise You' and 'The Rockafeller Skank', celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Pioneer
angles.copy: Right about now, the funk soul brother! Happy 63rd birthday to the legendary Fatboy Slim on July 31st. What's your go-to track for a rave-up?

moments.title: Will Champion (Coldplay) 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Coldplay drummer Will Champion celebrates his 48th birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: Coldplay Drummer
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Coldplay's Will Champion, who turns 48 on July 31st! What's your favourite Coldplay anthem?

moments.title: Daniel Ash (Bauhaus) 69th Birthday
moments.blurb: Guitarist Daniel Ash, known for his work with Bauhaus and Love and Rockets, turns 69 on July 31st.

angles.name: Goth Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 69th birthday to Daniel Ash, the guitar visionary from Bauhaus and Love and Rockets, on July 31st! What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

moments.title: Bill Berry (R.E.M.) 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Former R.E.M. drummer Bill Berry celebrates his 68th birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: R.E.M. Drummer
angles.copy: It's Bill Berry's birthday on July 31st! The legendary R.E.M. drummer turns 68. What's your favourite R.E.M. track he played on?

moments.title: UK Schools on Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are now on their summer break, with holidays typically running from late July or early August until late August or early September, varying by region.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: It's official: UK schools are now on their summer holidays! Whether you're off on an adventure or enjoying a staycation, have a fantastic break!

angles.name: Summer Plans
angles.copy: No more school runs for a few weeks! The summer holidays are in full swing across the UK. What are your big plans for the break?
